name: TaxMate Australia
description: Australian tax prep skill pack and plugin linked to official ATO sources, using a bash and Python runtime for conservative record review, GST/BAS, CGT, evidence gaps, accountant handoff, print-first HTML guide handoffs, and treatment flags.
tagline: Australian tax prep with ATO source links

install_targets.label: Codex
install_targets.value: Install TaxMate Australia from https://github.com/nijanthan-dev/taxmate-australia. Read README.md, DISCLAIMER.md, and the relevant SKILL.md files first. Treat it as a preparation aid only: do not provide professional advice and do not lodge, file, submit, transmit, or finalise anything with the ATO or any government agency.

suited_tasks: Identify evidence gaps and Accountant review items
Draft accountant-facing workbook, taxpack, and print-first HTML guide handoffs
Refresh and cite official ATO source pages
do_not_use_for: ATO lodgment, filing, submission, transmission, or finalisation
Filling official ATO PDFs or creating returns users can submit directly to the ATO
Professional tax, legal, accounting, financial, BAS-agent, registered-tax-agent, or investment advice
Bypassing evidence requirements, hiding income, overclaiming deductions, or fabricating records

notes: Not affiliated with or endorsed by the ATO
Ambiguous, mixed-use, GST/BAS, CGT, FBT, home-business, pre-revenue, business-versus-hobby, and non-commercial-loss items must stay flagged Accountant review
